name: Talonrakennusalan työehtosopimus
name_en: Collective Agreement for the Building Construction Industry

scope.description: The agreement covers work in the building construction industry. It is universally binding (yleissitova) in Finland, meaning all companies in the sector must comply with the minimum terms.

_extraction_notes: The provided source text is a landing page summary from the Rakennusliitto website, not the full PDF text of the collective agreement. Therefore, specific salary tables, exact section references, and detailed clauses (working hours, vacation, etc.) are not present in the source text. The data provided reflects the general information available on the landing page.
